title: Bismuth
description: A naive attempt at a custom color mod for 1.19.4
body:
# **Bismuth** ![You can use my code: theomenden to get 25% off your first month on a server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/06571c95-44fb-4192-87fd-5ec08cd0c08d.webp)
Quick Facts
  • Bismuth is both the most diamagnetic element and one of the least thermally conductive metals known.
  • Bismuth is a solid at room temperature
  • The atomic number for bismuth is 83.
  • The name bismuth dates to around 1665 and is of uncertain etymology.
Inspirations
  • Sodium Blending Registry
  • Better Biome Blend
  • Colormatic
Notables
  • Allows you to use different types of custom color resource packs
  • supports "colormatic", "optifine", and "bismuth" color spaces in resource packs
  • If you haven't already - make sure to go give the developers of Colormatic, Sodium, and Indium a massive thanks, stars, etc - they are to be credited immensely for the development of this mod! (especially Colormatic)
###### Any build released on github is not guaranteed to work. These are pre/alpha builds. **THIS MOD WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT INDIUM. Please include indium in your modlists.**
